title: Driving a Browser Programmatically
concept: Using browser automation libraries (like Playwright or Puppeteer) as the agent's actuation layer.

exercises.prompt: What do you use to view websites?
exercises.explain: A web browser is the tool that allows you to view and interact with websites.

cards.title: What is Browser Automation?
cards.body: Browser automation is using tools to control a web browser automatically, just like a robot can perform tasks for you!

cards.title: What are Automation Libraries?
cards.body: Automation libraries like Playwright and Puppeteer are tools that help you programmatically control web browsers. They let you tell a browser what to do.

cards.title: Think of it like Driving a Car!
cards.body: Using an automation library is like having a GPS system that drives a car for you. You just set the destination, and it takes you there!

cards.title: Practical Example
cards.body: With Playwright, you can write a script to automatically fill out a form on a website. Just like a human, but faster!

cards.title: Myth: It's Complicated!
cards.body: Many think that automating browsers is hard, but with libraries, it can be simple! Just write a few lines of code.

cards.title: Visualize Automation
cards.body: See how browser automation works in two easy steps:

left.text: A user manually clicks on a button.

right.text: An automation script clicks the button for you.

exercises.prompt: Which library can help you automate a web browser?
exercises.explain: Puppeteer is a specific library designed to help automate tasks in web browsers.

exercises.prompt: An automation library can simulate a real user's actions in a browser.
exercises.explain: That's correct! Automation libraries can mimic what a real user does.

exercises.prompt: Using browser automation, you can ___ a form on a website.
exercises.sentence: Using browser automation, you can fill out a form on a website.
exercises.explain: The correct action is 'fill out a form' as it showcases what automation can do on a website.

exercises.prompt: Which sentence describes a benefit of using browser automation?
exercises.explain: The correct answer highlights that browser automation is designed to improve efficiency and save time.

exercises.prompt: What can you achieve using an automation library like Playwright?
exercises.explain: The correct answer illustrates that automation libraries are powerful tools used to interact with data on websites effortlessly.
